test.name: Nao deve criar card com formulario vazio

kw.name: Dado que eu acesse o Organo
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Set Window Size
kw.doc: Sets current windows size to given ``width`` and ``height``.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Quando eu clicar em criar card sem preencher nada
Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.name: Nao deve criar card sem nome

kw.name: Dado que eu acesse o Organo
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Set Window Size
kw.doc: Sets current windows size to given ``width`` and ``height``.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Quando eu preencher apenas cargo
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Textfield Value Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies text field ``locator`` has exactly text ``expected``.

kw.name: Clicar em criar card
Scroll Element Into View
kw.msg: Keyword 'Capture Page Screenshot' could not be run on failure: Message: invalid session id; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#invalidsessionidexception Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7c43e29c5+2ed785] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7c410a0d0+14e90] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7c3e6d916] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7c3eb8313] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7c3eefe92] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7c3eea011] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7c3ee92c3] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7c3e36565] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7c440de0d+318bcd] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7c4408588+313348] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7c4429d7a+334b3a] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7c4126785+31545] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7c412facc+3a88c] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7c3e3532a] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7c4564b48+46f908] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ff9d8537374+14] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ff9d867cc91+21]

test.name: Nao deve criar card sem cargo

kw.name: Dado que eu acesse o Organo
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Set Window Size
kw.doc: Sets current windows size to given ``width`` and ``height``.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Textfield Value Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies text field ``locator`` has exactly text ``expected``.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Então devo ver erro de cargo
Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.name: Nao deve criar card sem selecionar time

kw.name: Dado que eu acesse o Organo
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Set Window Size
kw.doc: Sets current windows size to given ``width`` and ``height``.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Verifies text field ``locator`` has exactly text ``expected``.

kw.name: Preencher cargo

kw.name: Então devo ver erro de time
kw.msg: Keyword with same name defined multiple times.
kw.status: Keyword with same name defined multiple times.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.status:
Several failures occurred:
1) InvalidSessionIdException: Message: invalid session id: session deleted as the browser has closed the connection from disconnected: not connected to DevTools (Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.165); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#invalidsessionidexception Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7c43e29c5+2ed785] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7c410a0d0+14e90] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7c3e6db2d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7c3e58ca2] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7c3e7f416] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7c3ef70e0] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7c3f13482] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7c3eb9298] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7c3eba183] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7c440de0d+318bcd] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7c4408588+313348] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7c4429d7a+334b3a] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7c4126785+31545] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7c412facc+3a88c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7c4113634+1e3f4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7c41137e6+1e5a6] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7c40f7e37+2bf7] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ff9d8537374+14] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ff9d867cc91+21]
2) Keyword with same name defined multiple times.

errors.msg: Error in file 'C:\projetosQA\robot\testes\criar-card-invalido.robot' on line 55: Creating keyword 'Então devo ver erro de time' failed: Keyword with same name defined multiple times.
